issues.title: Issue #1: Intro to Sustainable Investing
issues.content: Welcome to EcoWise Wealth Digest! Sustainable investing involves considering environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria...

issues.title: Issue #2: The Rise of Green Bonds
issues.content: Green bonds are a great way to fund projects that have positive environmental benefits...

guides.title: Beginner's Guide to ESG
guides.content: ESG stands for Environmental, Social, and Governance. Investors are increasingly applying these non-financial factors as part of their analysis process to identify material risks and growth opportunities.

guides.title: Understanding Carbon Credits
guides.content: A carbon credit is a generic term for any tradable certificate or permit representing the right to emit one tonne of carbon dioxide...
